name: Reflex Kitten Food Chicken & Rice 15kg
shortDescription: Reflex Kitten Food Chicken & Rice is a premium, complete, and balanced diet specially formulated to support the optimal growth and development of kittens. Enriched with high-quality ingredients, this formula promotes muscle strength, immune resilience, and digestive wellbeing , ensuring your kitten grows healthy and active.
description: Reflex Kitten Food Chicken & Rice is a premium, complete, and balanced diet specially formulated to support the optimal growth and development of kittens. Enriched with high-quality ingredients, this formula promotes muscle strength, immune resilience, and digestive wellbeing , ensuring your kitten grows healthy and active. Key Features: High-Quality Protein Source: Made with 45% dehydrated chicken to provide superior protein for muscle development and growth . Balanced Nutrition: Fortified with essential vitamins, minerals, antioxidants, and taurine to enhance cognitive function, healthy vision, and organ performance. Omega Fatty Acids: Contains Omega 3 & 6 from natural flaxseed to maintain healthy skin, a shiny coat, and a strong immune system. Digestive Support: Enriched with mannan oligosaccharides (MOS) , yucca extract , and beta-glucans to promote optimal digestion, improve nutrient absorption, and reduce stool odour. Additional Nutrients: Brewer’s yeast supports skin and coat health, while whey aids immune strength, muscle recovery, and nerve function. Nutritional Composition: Crude Protein: 37% Crude Fat: 20% Crude Ash: 8% Crude Fibre: 3% Enriched with Vitamins A, D3, E, C, K3, B-Complex , and minerals including Zinc, Iron, Copper, Manganese, Iodine , and Selenium . Contains 1,500 mg/kg Taurine to support heart function and healthy vision. Ingredients: Dehydrated chicken proteins (45%), rice (10%), wheat bran, cereals, chicken fat, corn gluten, liver aroma, flaxseed, dried beet pulp, brewer's yeast, MOS, yucca, taurine, vitamins, minerals, and natural antioxidants. Health Benefits: Promotes strong muscles and steady growth Supports digestive balance and immune system health Enhances skin condition and coat shine Improves nutrient absorption and intestinal hygiene Reduces stool odour and ammonia levels for a cleaner environment Feeding Recommendation: Feed according to your kitten’s age, activity level, and living conditions . Gradually adjust portion sizes while monitoring weight, stool quality, and overall health to maintain an ideal body condition. Regular feeding with Reflex Chicken & Rice contributes to a healthy, happy, and energetic kitten .
